creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
> $ mvn
> Not a directory: /usr/local/share/java/maven
> $ echo $?
> 2

These maven packages are installed:
> $ pkg info | grep maven
> maven-3.8.8_1                  Java project management tool
> maven-wrapper-2                Wrapper script for the various installations of Maven


FreeBSD 14.1 amd64
